title: US Holidays on Monday.com Calendar
excerpt: Is there a way to include US holidays on the Monday.com calendar? We are using Formula to calculate Working Days and it is not capturing holidays.

posts.author: eburley_tmhcc (Erica)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to include US holidays on the Monday.com calendar? We are using Formula to calculate Working Days and it is not capturing holidays.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@eburley_tmhcc

Since you are using a formula to calculate working days, you might look to a formula similar to the one below. It calculates the net work days excluding the listed holidays.

NETWORKDAYS({Requested Dates#Start}, {Requested Dates#End},  
 ARGS2ARRAY("2024/01/01","2024/03/18","2024/03/25","2024/05/01","2024/05/06","2024/06/24", "2024/08/15","2024/10/28", "2024/12/25","2024/12/26")
)

Jim - The Monday Man
Get Custom Apps, Integrations & Automations for monday

posts.author: joc.p (Joc.P)
posts.cookedHtml: I had ChatGPT create a CSV of holidays and imported them as items. This was the only workaround I could find to get holidays to appear without manually creating every one.

posts.author: Scarletioshub (Scarletioshub)
posts.cookedHtml: Monday doesn’t automatically include US holidays, but you can add them manually by creating a “Holiday” list. Then, adjust your “Working Days” formula to exclude these dates.

posts.author: alexsam986 (alex sam)
posts.cookedHtml:
There may be two ways to include holidays on Monday.com
Manually include Holidays in a separate column.

When calculating working days using formulas like NETWORKDAYS, include a reference to this holiday list to exclude those days.

Third-party integrations or alternative calculation methods.

posts.author: kylecordes (Kyle Cordes)
posts.cookedHtml: This is an excellent solution - Inevitably, end users want to be able to tweak what is considered a holiday, accommodate a particular organization to observe certain holidays, accommodate spanning different countries with different holidays, etc.

posts.author: Michaleiba (Michal Leiba)
posts.cookedHtml:
